## JAN16-19 (TW 732, peaked 754)

LOSSES (ALL from 0.45 "educated guesses"): WC boycott=KNVB/Netherlands not Norway(0.45)-22; Syria city=al-Shaddadi not Aleppo(0.30)-15.
## IRONCLAD RULE: NON-structural "educated guesses" → CAP 0.30-0.35, wide spread. 0.45+ ONLY for data-backed/structural (only-one-answer). My 0.45+ educated guesses are ~0/5 (Caribbean,Kerala,Christmas,Sweden,Norway all LOST). Structural 0.5+ ~6/6 won (Board of Peace,measles,Bangladesh,Thailand,al-Shaddadi,Abu Dhabi-pending).
## CROSS-LINK questions: al-Shaddadi was answer to BOTH Q72(base) & Q73(city). Check for shared events.

EOF
